metadata.description: A design-focused AI harness. 4 skills + 10 sub-agents + 17 starter rubrics on YAML-criteria schema. Walks teams through scaffolding, reviewing, and compounding lessons across the five-layer harness (Context, Skills, Orchestration, Rubrics, Knowledge). Bundles context7 connector.

plugins.name: harness-designing
plugins.description: Design-focused AI harness for design teams. 4 skills + 10 sub-agents + 17 starter rubrics on YAML-criteria schema. context7 connector for library doc lookup.
